# ThemeKit component reference

115 public SwiftUI components. Every one reads `@Environment(\.theme)` and resolves all colors from tokens ‚Äî **never hardcode a color**. Init shows the *required/common* params; long-tail styling is set with the chainable modifiers listed at the bottom.

## Atoms (29)

- `AnimatedImage(url, contentMode:, cornerRadius:)` ‚Äî Animated GIF / APNG playback with NO third-party dependency ‚Äî frames and per-frame delays are decoded natively via ImageIO (`CGImageSource`) and driven by a `TimelineView(.animation)`.
- `Avatar(content)` ‚Äî Atom. ¬∑ modifiers: `.size()`, `.dimension()`, `.fillColor()`, `.shape()`, `.presence()`
- `AvatarGroup` ‚Äî Overlapping stack of avatars with a "+N" overflow bubble.
- `Badge(text, action:)` ‚Äî Improved, token-bound rewrite of the reference BadgeView. ¬∑ modifiers: `.badgeStyle()`, `.variant()`, `.size()`, `.icon()`, `.badgeShape()`, `.trailingIcon()`, `.badgeColor()`, `.gradient()`, `.highlighted()`
- `Chip(title, isSelected:, size:, selectionStyle:)` ‚Äî Improved, token-bound rewrite of the reference BasicChip ‚Äî a single clear selection API (tonal / solid) instead of the reference's nested status √ó mode √ó fullSelect √ó isExist matrix. ¬∑ modifiers: `.icon()`, `.rating()`, `.exists()`, `.interactive()`, `.expands()`
- `Ribbon(text, color:, @ViewBuilder:)` ‚Äî A corner ribbon wrapping any content (Ant `Badge.Ribbon`).
- `DividerView(title)` ‚Äî A theme-driven divider: horizontal / vertical, solid / dashed, with an optional inline text label (left / center / right). ¬∑ modifiers: `.size()`, `.axis()`, `.dashed()`, `.titleAlign()`
- `GaugeView(value:, in:, label:)` ‚Äî Atom. ¬∑ modifiers: `.gaugeStyle()`, `.showsValue()`
- `Icon(systemName:, size:, color:)` ‚Äî Icon system.
- `InlineText(text, links:)` ‚Äî Atom.
- `InputLabel(text, isRequired:, hasInfo:, hasError:)` ‚Äî Atom.
- `Join(axis, @ViewBuilder:)` ‚Äî Atom.
- `Kbd(text)` ‚Äî Atom.
- `ProgressBar(value:, showPercentage:, status:)` ‚Äî Linear determinate progress with status colors, an optional ladder gradient, a segmented (steps) variant and a custom format label. ¬∑ modifiers: `.barHeight()`, `.gradient()`, `.steps()`, `.colors()`, `.successSegment()`, `.valueFormat()`, `.progressLabel()`
- `StepIndicator` ‚Äî Segmented step indicator (e.g.
- `RadialProgress(value)` ‚Äî Atom. ¬∑ modifiers: `.size()`, `.lineWidth()`, `.showsLabel()`, `.status()`, `.dashboard()`, `.ringColor()`, `.a11yLabel()`
- `Rating(value:, layout:, countLabel:)` ‚Äî Star rating with two layouts (stars / numeric-leading), continuous fractional fill (display) or half-step interaction, a tappable review count, a custom character and a disabled state. ¬∑ modifiers: `.maxValue()`, `.starSize()`, `.allowHalf()`, `.symbol()`, `.sentiment()`, `.onRate()`, `.onReviewTap()`
- `RemoteImage(url)` ‚Äî Async remote image on native `AsyncImage` (no Kingfisher dependency): URL + aspect ratio (number or "16:9" string) + shimmer placeholder + failure state. ¬∑ modifiers: `.ratio()`, `.contentMode()`, `.cornerRadius()`, `.circle()`
- `RollingNumber(value, size:, weight:, color:)` ‚Äî Odometer / slot-machine number ‚Äî each digit column rolls vertically to its new value when `value` changes (reference `RollingText`).
- `ScoreBadge(score, large:)` ‚Äî Atom.
- `ShareButton(title, item:)` ‚Äî Atom.
- `Skeleton(shape, width:, height:)` ‚Äî A standalone skeleton block of an arbitrary shape and size.
- `Spinner(size:, lineWidth:, color:)` ‚Äî Atom.
- `StatusDot(kind, size:, label:, pulse:)` ‚Äî Atom.
- `Swap(isOn:, on:, off:, size:, rotate:)` ‚Äî Atom. ¬∑ modifiers: `.a11yID()`
- `Tag(text, leadingSystemImage:, style:, variant:, onRemove:)` ‚Äî Atom.
- `TextLink(title, underline:, action:)` ‚Äî Atom.
- `TextRotate(words, interval:)` ‚Äî Atom.
- `Title(text, subtitle:, eyebrow:, actionTitle:, action:)` ‚Äî Atom.

## Molecules (45)

- `Autocomplete(label:, text:, suggestions:, placeholder:, onSelect:)` ‚Äî Molecule. ¬∑ modifiers: `.a11yID()`, `.maxResults()`, `.debounce()`, `.suggestionEnabled()`, `.onSearch()`
- `Breadcrumbs(title, action:)` ‚Äî Molecule.
- `ButtonGroup(axis, @ViewBuilder:)` ‚Äî Molecule.
- `PrimaryButton(title, size:, block:, helperText:, textStyle:, confirmsSuccess: ‚Ä¶)`
- `SecondaryButton`
- `OutlineButton`
- `GhostButton`
- `LinkButton`
- `ThemeButton(title, action:)` ¬∑ modifiers: `.variant()`, `.color()`, `.size()`, `.shape()`, `.fullWidth()`, `.loading()`, `.icon()`, `.a11yID()`
- `CalendarView(selection:)` ‚Äî Molecule.
- `Checkbox(label, isChecked:, infoMessages:)` ‚Äî Figma "Control Items" ‚Üí Checkboxes. ¬∑ modifiers: `.type()`, `.indeterminate()`, `.alignment()`, `.customSize()`, `.a11yID()`
- `CheckboxGroup(title:, options:, selection:, infoMessages:, selectAllTitle:, isOptionEnabled:)` ‚Äî Molecule. ¬∑ modifiers: `.a11yID()`
- `ImageChip(isSelected:, url:, size:, isEnabled:)` ‚Äî A selectable remote-image tile with a selection border.
- `CompactChip` ‚Äî A selectable card: an optional rating + label row, then an optional logo + price row.
- `ChoseChip` ‚Äî A selectable card: a leading icon, a title with an optional "free" gradient badge, and a rating + description row.
- `FilterChip` ‚Äî A dismissible filter chip in a pill (with a soft shadow) or square shape.
- `ChipGroup` ‚Äî A horizontally-scrolling, multi-select chip group backed by a `Set` binding.
- `ColorField(label, selection:, supportsOpacity:)` ‚Äî Molecule.
- `DateField(label, date:)` ‚Äî Molecule. ¬∑ modifiers: `.placeholder()`, `.range()`, `.style()`, `.locale()`, `.components()`, `.infoMessages()`, `.clearable()`, `.icon()`, `.a11yID()`
- `Fieldset(title, helper:, @ViewBuilder:)` ‚Äî Molecule.
- `FileInput(label, onPick:)` ‚Äî Molecule. ¬∑ modifiers: `.fileName()`, `.buttonTitle()`, `.placeholder()`, `.infoMessages()`, `.onClear()`
- `FilterGroup(title:, options:, selection:, label:)` ‚Äî Molecule.
- `InputNumber(label, value:, range:)` ‚Äî Molecule. ¬∑ modifiers: `.step()`, `.unit()`, `.hint()`, `.errorText()`, `.large()`, `.editable()`, `.hasInfo()`, `.onValueChange()`, `.a11yID()`
- `MultiLineTextInput(label, text:)` ‚Äî Improved, token-bound rewrite of the reference MultiLineInput ‚Äî a bordered TextEditor with header label, placeholder, character counter and error state. ¬∑ modifiers: `.placeholder()`, `.characterLimit()`, `.errorText()`, `.infoMessages()`, `.minHeight()`, `.a11yID()`
- `MultiSelect(label:, options:, selection:, placeholder:, infoMessages:, isOptionEnabled:)` ‚Äî Multiple / tags select with optional search (Ant Select mode="multiple"). ¬∑ modifiers: `.a11yID()`, `.searchable()`, `.clearable()`, `.maxTags()`, `.loading()`
- `OTPInput(code:, onComplete:)` ‚Äî Improved, token-bound rewrite of the reference OTPInputView. ¬∑ modifiers: `.digitCount()`, `.secure()`, `.errorText()`, `.infoMessages()`, `.resend()`, `.a11yID()`
- `Pagination(current:, total:)` ‚Äî Molecule. ¬∑ modifiers: `.simple()`, `.window()`, `.jumper()`, `.showTotal()`
- `ProgressIndicator(variant:, current:, total:)` ‚Äî Segmented position/progress indicator (Reference ProgressIndicator parity). ¬∑ modifiers: `.size()`, `.videoProgress()`, `.stepText()`, `.cornerRadius()`
- `QuantityStepper(value:, range:, step:)` ‚Äî A token-bound quantity stepper (‚àí value +), bounded by a range. ¬∑ modifiers: `.a11yID()`
- `RadioButton(label, isSelected:, infoMessages:)` ‚Äî Figma "Control Items" ‚Üí Radioboxes. ¬∑ modifiers: `.type()`, `.radioStyle()`, `.gap()`, `.fillColor()`, `.alignment()`, `.a11yID()`
- `RadioGroup(title:, options:, selection:, infoMessages:, isOptionEnabled:)` ‚Äî Molecule. ¬∑ modifiers: `.a11yID()`
- `RadioButtonGroup` ‚Äî A connected, segmented button-style single-select radio group ‚Äî a distinct API from the stacked `RadioGroup` and the enclosed `SegmentedControl`.
- `RangeSlider(lowerValue:, upperValue:, in:, step:)` ‚Äî Improved, token-bound rewrite of the reference RangeSliderView ‚Äî a self-contained dual-thumb slider over a numeric range (decoupled from the reference's text-field wiring). ¬∑ modifiers: `.a11yID()`, `.marks()`, `.inputs()`, `.onChangeEnd()`, `.valueLabel()`
- `SearchBar(text:, placeholder:, suggestions:, recent:, onSearch:)` ‚Äî A search field with optional typeahead suggestions, a recent-searches list and submit/clear callbacks. ¬∑ modifiers: `.a11yID()`, `.backButton()`, `.trailingIcon()`, `.debounce()`, `.maxResults()`
- `SegmentedControl(title, systemImage:, isEnabled:)` ‚Äî Molecule. ¬∑ modifiers: `.a11yID()`
- `Select(title, options)` ‚Äî A single-select dropdown ‚Äî a native `Menu` by default, or a searchable inline panel with section headers when `searchable` is on. ¬∑ modifiers: `.a11yID()`
- `SelectBox(label:, options:, selection:, placeholder:, hint:, errorText: ‚Ä¶)` ‚Äî Molecule. ¬∑ modifiers: `.a11yID()`
- `Slider(value:, in:, step:, label:)` ‚Äî Molecule. ¬∑ modifiers: `.a11yID()`, `.marks()`, `.axis()`, `.showsValueTooltip()`, `.onChangeEnd()`
- `Stat(title:, value:)` ‚Äî Molecule. ¬∑ modifiers: `.prefix()`, `.suffix()`, `.loading()`, `.description()`, `.icon()`, `.trend()`
- `Steps(title, description:, systemImage:, state:, percent:)` ‚Äî A horizontal or vertical step / progress indicator with done / active / todo / error states, an optional progress dot, and tap-to-navigate.
- `TextInput(label:, placeholder:, leadingSystemImage:, suffixSystemImage:, addonBefore:, addonAfter: ‚Ä¶)` ‚Äî Single floating-label text field. ¬∑ modifiers: `.a11yID()`
- `ThemeController(name:, label:)` ‚Äî Molecule.
- `ThemeToggle(isOn:, isLoading:, onSystemImage:, offSystemImage:)` ‚Äî Figma "Control Items" ‚Üí Switch Toggles. ¬∑ modifiers: `.a11yID()`
- `ToggleGroup(title:, options:, selection:, label:)` ‚Äî Molecule. ¬∑ modifiers: `.a11yID()`
- `TreeSelect(id:, title, systemImage:, children:)` ‚Äî Hierarchical (nested) select with expand/collapse and multi-selection. ¬∑ modifiers: `.placeholder()`, `.cascade()`, `.searchable()`, `.loading()`, `.nodeEnabled()`

## Organisms (41)

- `Accordion(title, leadingSystemImage:, initiallyExpanded:, @ViewBuilder:)` ‚Äî Improved, token-bound rewrite of the reference AccordionView ‚Äî a single expandable row with a @ViewBuilder body instead of type-erased AnyView models. ¬∑ modifiers: `.subtitle()`, `.number()`, `.indicator()`, `.titleSize()`, `.density()`, `.truncateSubtitle()`, `.divider()`
- `AccordionGroup(items, mode:, initiallyExpanded:, title:)` ‚Äî A group of accordion rows with single- or multiple-open behavior (the reference `AccordionView` tracks a `Set` of open ids).
- `AlertToast(title, handler:)` ‚Äî Improved, token-bound rewrite of the reference AlertView ‚Äî a solid-fill status banner (complements the light-surface InfoBanner). ¬∑ modifiers: `.message()`, `.variant()`, `.icon()`, `.loading()`, `.action()`, `.onClose()`
- `BlogCard(title:, excerpt:, readMoreTitle:, compact:, onReadMore:)` ‚Äî Organism.
- `Callout(text)` ‚Äî Organism. ¬∑ modifiers: `.variant()`, `.calloutStyle()`, `.showsIcon()`, `.action()`, `.onClose()`
- `Card(elevation:, padding:, title:, subtitle:, extraTitle:, onExtra:)` ‚Äî Organism.
- `CardStack(items, @ViewBuilder:)` ‚Äî Organism.
- `Carousel(items, loop:, currentIndex:, @ViewBuilder:)` ‚Äî A generic paging carousel with dot indicators, optional autoplay and optional prev/next arrows. ¬∑ modifiers: `.autoplay()`, `.arrows()`, `.dots()`, `.fade()`
- `ChatBubble(text, side:, author:, time:, avatarSystemImage:)` ‚Äî Organism.
- `Counter(value:, label:)` ‚Äî Organism.
- `Coupon(code:, label:, style:, onCopy:)` ‚Äî Organism.
- `DataTable(title, align:, sortKey:)` ‚Äî Organism.
- `Diff(aspectRatio:, @ViewBuilder:)` ‚Äî Organism.
- `EmptyState(title)` ‚Äî Improved, token-bound rewrite of the reference EmptyCardView. ¬∑ modifiers: `.icon()`, `.message()`, `.imageMaxHeight()`, `.iconForeground()`, `.iconBackground()`, `.iconCircleSize()`, `.primaryAction()`, `.secondaryAction()`
- `FloatingActionButton(systemImage:, label:, action:)` ‚Äî Organism. ¬∑ modifiers: `.shape()`, `.color()`, `.badge()`
- `Footer(title, action:)` ‚Äî Organism.
- `Gallery(items, columns:, aspect:, @ViewBuilder:)` ‚Äî Organism.
- `Hero(title:, subtitle:, ctaTitle:, dark:, action:)` ‚Äî Organism.
- `HeroSurface` ‚Äî The default `Hero` surface.
- `ImageCollage(urls, height:, spacing:, cornerRadius:, onTap:)` ‚Äî A gallery collage of remote images with count-aware layouts (1 / 2 / 3 / 4+) and a "+N" overlay on the last visible tile.
- `InfoBanner(message, type:, title:, links:)` ‚Äî Improved, token-bound rewrite of the reference InfoMessage.
- `KeyValueTable(label, value:, style:)` ‚Äî Organism.
- `ListRow(total:, each:, unit:)` ‚Äî A flexible list row that consolidates the reference ListItem family (Default / Chevron / Checkbox / Radio / Menu / Quick-action) into one token-bound view. ¬∑ modifiers: `.subtitle()`, `.number()`, `.size()`, `.icon()`, `.leadingImage()`, `.leadingSelection()`, `.alertCount()`, `.badge()`, `.meta()`, `.infos()`, `.selected()`, `.multilineTitle()`, `.trailing()`, `.onInfo()`
- `ListSectionHeader` ‚Äî A non-interactive section-header row inside a list (Reference menu `.secondary`).
- `ListView(items, header:, footer:, bordered:, loading:, split: ‚Ä¶)` ‚Äî Ant-style List container: optional header/footer, bordered surface, row dividers (split), and a loading (skeleton) state.
- `MenuCard(title:, subtitle:, systemImage:, action:)` ‚Äî Organism.
- `NavigationBar(systemImage:, activeSystemImage:)` ‚Äî Organism.
- `NotificationCard(title:, message:, date:, isUnread:, type:, onClose:)` ‚Äî Organism.
- `PageHeader(systemImage:, handler:)` ‚Äî Organism.
- `PagingCarousel(items, peek:, spacing:, autoplay:, @ViewBuilder:)` ‚Äî Custom drag-paging carousel with PEEKING neighbors + threshold snap (the reference `PagingScrollView`).
- `PromoBanner(title, action:)` ‚Äî Organism. ¬∑ modifiers: `.subtitle()`, `.icon()`, `.ctaTitle()`, `.color()`
- `RatingSummary(score:, label:, reviewCount:, onReviews:)` ‚Äî Organism.
- `ResultView(status, title:, message:, primaryTitle:, onPrimary:)` ‚Äî Ant-style "Result" template: a full-page status view for the outcome of an operation (success / info / warning / error) or an exception page (404 / 403 / 500), with up to two actions.
- `SegmentedTabBar(title, caption:, systemImage:, trailingSystemImage:, badge:, isEnabled:)` ‚Äî Tab bar with a selection binding and an animated underline. ¬∑ modifiers: `.a11yID()`
- `RadioCard(title, description:, isSelected:, isEnabled:, action:)` ‚Äî Organisms.
- `CheckboxCard`
- `ThemePicker(selection:, themes:, onSelect:)` ‚Äî A grid of `ThemePreset` preview cards.
- `Timeline(title:, time:, description:, systemImage:, state:, color:)` ‚Äî Organism. ¬∑ modifiers: `.axis()`, `.mode()`, `.reversed()`, `.pending()`
- `Upload(id:, name:, status:)` ‚Äî Organism.
- `UploadList` ‚Äî `Upload` wired to an `UploadController` ‚Äî renders its files with remove + retry.
- `VideoPlayerView(url, progress:, isMuted:, onTap:)` ‚Äî Inline video on AVKit (reference `InlineVideoPlayerView`): autoplay, loop, mute, aspect-fill, and active-gating (only the visible item plays). ¬∑ modifiers: `.autoplay()`, `.loop()`, `.muted()`, `.muteToggle()`, `.tapToToggle()`
